OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIN JIN ENTERPRISES INC.
RESPONSE TO OPPOS. TO MTN TO VACATE JUDGMENT VOID ON ITS FACE FILED BY DEFENDANT SWAMI, BRAHMABUTA K.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BRAHMABUTA SWAMI'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT VOID ON ITS FACE [CCP SEC 473, SUBD, (D)] IS GRANTED. AT THE TIME PLAINTIFF PURPORTEDLY SUBSTITUTED DEFENDANT FOR DOE 1. THERE WAS NO SUCH DEFENDANT BECAUSE THE DOES HAD ALL BEEN DISMISSED. THE ORIGINALLY NAMED DEFENDANT WAS SUBSEQUENTLY DISMISSED. THEREFORE, THERE WAS NO PROPER DEFENDANT IN THE CASE WHEN JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED AND THE JUDGMENT IS VOID. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment Void On Its Face [Ccp Sec 473, Subd, (D)]
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT GARCIA, TEL. NO. 648-3060 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BRAHMABUTA SWAMI'S Motion To Vacate Judgment Void On Its Face [Ccp Sec 473, Subd, (D)] IS GRANTED. AT THE TIME PLAINTIFF PURPORTEDLY SUBSTITUTED DEFENDANT FOR DOE 1. THERE WAS NO SUCH DEFENDANT BECAUSE THE DOES HAD ALL BEEN DISMISSED. THE ORIGINALLY NAMED DEFENDANT WAS SUBSEQUENTLY DISMISSED. THEREFORE THERE WAS NO PROPER DEFENDANT IN THE CASE WHEN JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED AND THE JUDGMENT IS VOID. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
